message:
feat(messaging): add C-ERR-05 error classification across all messaging backends

Implement is_transient, is_connection_error, is_capacity_error, is_timeout,
and is_retryable on NatsError, JsError, KafkaError, and RedisError. Add 33
contract tests covering all variants and cross-system equivalence. Close
ERR-G3 gap; update T6.9 contract artifacts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -109,7 +109,7 @@
           "nats": ["io_error", "transient_server_err"],
           "redis": ["io_error", "connection_reset"]
         },
-        "status": "not_implemented"
+        "status": "implemented"
       },
       {
         "id": "C-ERR-04",
@@ -167,7 +167,13 @@
           "is_timeout",
           "is_retryable"
         ],
-        "status": "not_implemented"
+        "backend_status": {
+          "nats": "implemented",
+          "jetstream": "implemented",
+          "kafka": "implemented",
+          "redis": "implemented"
+        },
+        "status": "implemented"
       }
     ],
     "idempotency": [
@@ -334,7 +340,7 @@
     "total_contracts": 19,
     "domains": {
       "retry": {"count": 5, "implemented": 3, "partial": 0, "defined": 1, "not_implemented": 1},
-      "error_classification": {"count": 3, "implemented": 1, "partial": 0, "defined": 0, "not_implemented": 2},
+      "error_classification": {"count": 3, "implemented": 3, "partial": 0, "defined": 0, "not_implemented": 0},
       "idempotency": {"count": 3, "implemented": 0, "partial": 1, "defined": 1, "not_implemented": 1},
       "delivery": {"count": 3, "implemented": 0, "partial": 0, "defined": 3, "not_implemented": 0},
       "failure_propagation": {"count": 3, "implemented": 0, "partial": 0, "defined": 3, "not_implemented": 0},
@@ -345,7 +351,7 @@
       {"id": "RTY-G1", "severity": "closed", "description": "MySQL/SQLite transaction retry — IMPLEMENTED"},
       {"id": "ERR-G1", "severity": "closed", "description": "MySQL/SQLite error classification methods — IMPLEMENTED"},
       {"id": "ERR-G2", "severity": "closed", "description": "PostgreSQL is_transient/is_connection_error — IMPLEMENTED"},
-      {"id": "ERR-G3", "severity": "medium", "description": "Messaging error classification methods missing"},
+      {"id": "ERR-G3", "severity": "closed", "description": "Messaging error classification methods — IMPLEMENTED"},
       {"id": "RTY-G2", "severity": "medium", "description": "Connection pool retry not implemented"},
       {"id": "IMP-G1", "severity": "low", "description": "Request-level idempotency keys not implemented"}
     ]

@@ -125,9 +125,9 @@ fn error_code(&self) -> Option<&str>;
 ```
 
 Current status:
-- PostgreSQL: has `is_serialization_failure`, `is_deadlock`, `is_unique_violation`
-- MySQL: has server error code/state, but NO classification methods
-- SQLite: errors as strings, NO classification methods
+- PostgreSQL: Implemented (all methods)
+- MySQL: Implemented (all methods)
+- SQLite: Implemented (all applicable methods; `is_serialization_failure`/`is_deadlock` N/A)
 
 ### C-ERR-05: Messaging Error Classification
 
@@ -141,6 +141,12 @@ fn is_timeout(&self) -> bool;
 fn is_retryable(&self) -> bool;
 ```
 
+Current status:
+- NATS: Implemented (`src/messaging/nats.rs`)
+- JetStream: Implemented (`src/messaging/jetstream.rs`)
+- Kafka: Implemented (`src/messaging/kafka.rs`)
+- Redis: Implemented (`src/messaging/redis.rs`)
+
 ## 3. Idempotency Contracts
 
 ### C-IMP-01: Producer Idempotency
@@ -287,6 +293,15 @@ Timeouts MUST act as backpressure release valves:
 | MySQL | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented |
 | SQLite | Implemented | Implemented | N/A | N/A | Implemented |
 
+### Messaging Error Classification Status (C-ERR-05)
+
+| Backend | `is_transient` | `is_connection_error` | `is_capacity_error` | `is_timeout` | `is_retryable` |
+|---------|---------------|----------------------|---------------------|--------------|----------------|
+| NATS | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented |
+| JetStream | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented |
+| Kafka | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented |
+| Redis | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented | Implemented |
+
 ### Idempotency Status
